idea: Prefetch scale_a and scale_b values into registers before the WGMMA loop. Currently scale_accumulator loads scale_a from global memory after WGMMA, causing L1TEX scoreboard stalls. By loading scale factors before WGMMA starts, the loads overlap with TMA wait and WGMMA compute.
expected_gain: +2-5% TFLOPS from hiding scale load latency
